/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=15.3 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/drone_viewer.dir/viewer.cpp.o -o drone_viewer  /opt/homebrew/Cellar/raylib/5.5/lib/libraylib.dylib -framework CoreVideo -framework IOKit -framework Cocoa -framework GLUT -framework OpenGL -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/raylib/5.5/lib -lraylib
